changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_control_config c JOIN hive_compliance_standard_section sec ON c.standard_section_id = sec.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard std ON sec.standard_id = std.id WHERE std.standard_name = 'SOC 2 Type II' AND sec.standard_section_name LIKE '%CC6%'

changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_control_mapping m JOIN hive_compliance_control_config c ON m.control_id = c.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard_section sec ON c.standard_section_id = sec.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard std ON sec.standard_id = std.id WHERE std.standard_name = 'SOC 2 Type II'
